Family photograph restored side-by-side — original faded sepia vs sharp colour-revived

image:image.image:title: Logo vectorization ALTURA SOLUTIONS — pixelated JPG 72dpi vs sharp AI/EPS/SVG vector
Designer in Adobe Illustrator hand-tracing IRONHAVEN FITNESS logo bezier curves

Logo proofs at 5 sizes showing scalability — AI, EPS, SVG, PDF, PNG file format tags
Logo vectorization JPG vs vector on dual tablets — social preview
image:image.image:caption: Open Graph preview — same shield-mark logo displayed on two tablets side-by-side, left showing pixelated 72dpi JPG, right showing perfect vector with visible anchor points and AI · EPS · SVG · PDF file-format tags
